task: Analyze: Aston Villa vs Nottingham Forest (UEL)

CLAUDE.dialogue: Villa Park fortress.\nEmery's European\nrecord is elite.

GEMINI.dialogue: Key stats:\nVilla scored in 8/10\nhome Euro games.

MISTRAL.dialogue: Forest counter-attack:\nElanga pace vs\nVilla high line.

LLAMA.dialogue: Watkins vs Murillo\nis the key duel.\nVilla striker inform.

result.analysis: MAIN AGENT REPORT: Both English sides know each other well from PL. Villa Park crowd gives Villa the edge. Emery's European pedigree vs Forest's defensive discipline. Key factor: Watkins' movement against Forest backline. Prediction: Villa 2-1 — narrow win, Watkins and Tielemans decisive. Forest will push late.
